title: Evangelion Memes and Motivators and random Images
display_title: Evangelion Memes and Motivators and random Images
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Memes & Motivators (and random Images) Post by Giggos » Sat Jan 08, 2011 7:01 am Hello fellow Eva geeks. My first post Anyway back to topic. Im an avid Meme collector. Currently im collecting Evangelion ones. For those that dont know what Meme's are. They are simply images with text at the top or bottom to illustrate a joke. As a offering to the forum and to get this going ill post my own. Hope you all can find it in your hearts (and may even find it fun) to dig up or make your own meme's and post them here. purposefully not resized to maintain resolution. Big images are very welcome! Edit: www.memegenerator.net is brilliant for making meme's. Let me know if youve got questions.

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Jan 08, 2011 7:02 am Meme´s don´t work´s that´s way´s.

[]: Post by Giggos » Sat Jan 08, 2011 7:06 am Its topic specific so anything is possible. Im specifically asking for these on an evangelion related forum. So it shouldnt be hard to find one or two.

[]: Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sat Jan 08, 2011 8:33 am He's trying to point out that there's no apostrophe in the word "memes", and what you're writing really sounds like "memeses". It's also not a proper noun, so it probably shouldn't be capitalized unless it's at the start of a sentence.

[]: Post by ShadowGT » Sat Jan 08, 2011 9:25 am I love random google searches. Not all of these are very meme-ish but i thought they were funny regardless. http://fc01.deviantart.net/fs40/f/2009/015/1/d/01_NGE_Rei_Ayanami_by_pabloyungblut.jpg http://teh1337.nfshost.com/img/nge_authority.jpg Cant forget the classic ;) http://static.tvtropes.org/pmwiki/pub/images/nrs-blo19_you-gonna-get-reiped_3946.jpg http://teh1337.nfshost.com/img/nge_dance.gif Then theres that whole Gendo pose meme

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sat Jan 08, 2011 11:29 am Then theres that whole Gendo pose meme

[]: Post by The Triforce Fighter » Sat Jan 08, 2011 4:41 pm Well there's the infamous 'Gendowned' [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3RjtXvWQWFs[/url] Although that isn't the orginal from AMV Hell its by the far my favorite version of the meme. And of course there's also Gendo's theme from Evangelion Redeath. [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8teoFq4CH9s&NR=1[/url]

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jan 08, 2011 5:54 pm Didn't we already have a thread for funny Eva images?

[]: Post by Ornette » Sat Jan 08, 2011 6:40 pm There's this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7024 Which was originally about parody comics but turned into an image macro thread. There's also the old Caption Contest thread http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=297 which was originally more image macros then just random images with lots of comments about them.

[]: Post by Born of Lilith » Sun Jan 09, 2011 7:18 am ITT: Forced memes (a few funny ones tho)

[]: Post by drinian » Sun Jan 09, 2011 1:27 pm I only came here to edit the topic of the thread, because it makes my brain hurt. Also because memes are much more than just "images with some text at the bottom" . I thought we liked to corral this stuff in the Moonwalk thread, but whatever. Carry on.

[]: Post by Galaxy News Reidio » Sun Jan 09, 2011 2:22 pm An example of an actual Evangelion meme, using a definition of meme that doesn't make Richard Dawkins cry, would be "Everyone gets hugged and turned into Tang/Tango/Tomato Soup/Orange Juice."

[]: Post by Xard » Sun Jan 09, 2011 5:53 pm Using definitions of meme that do make Richard Dawkins cry is actually preferrable

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sun Jan 09, 2011 6:11 pm Xard wrote: Using definitions of meme that do make Richard Dawkins cry is actually preferrable

[]: Post by Xard » Sun Jan 09, 2011 6:12 pm Meme is junk science but good internet slang is all I'm saying

[]: Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sun Jan 09, 2011 6:56 pm 'nough said.

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Jan 13, 2011 9:45 pm I'm not sure if you would count this as a meme or not but . Click play then credits. I just had to laugh at this.

[]: Post by Combs » Sat Jan 15, 2011 3:46 am The cataloguing of memery hints greatly at the direction society, and by extension human intelligence, is moving. Knowyourmeme and memegenerator should be nuked off of the net. Don't want it spoiling the collective unconscious for when the time comes.

[]: Post by Clover » Sat Jan 15, 2011 12:19 pm Combs wrote: The cataloguing of memery hints greatly at the direction society, and by extension human intelligence, is moving. Knowyourmeme and memegenerator should be nuked off of the net. Don't want it spoiling the collective unconscious for when the time comes.
